title: "Unveiling Samhain: The Mystical Pagan New Year Festival"
description: Samhain, the Pagan New Year, is an ancient Celtic festival marking the transition from one year to the next, celebrated from October 31 to November 1. The festival, which honors the cycle of death and rebirth, involves various traditions such as creating altars, lighting bonfires, preparing a 'dumb supper' for ancestors, and divination, and is considered a time when the boundary between our world and the Otherworld is more permeable.
